message:
fix(installer): quote User-Agent key in PowerShell hash literals

PowerShell requires hash literal keys containing hyphens to be quoted.
Without quotes, `User-Agent` is parsed as `User` minus `Agent`, causing
a parse error. Fixed all 3 occurrences:
- Resolve-LatestReleaseTag (line 40)
- Install-Cass (line 198)
- Install-Cm (line 247)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
